basics.name: Fengzhe Zhang
basics.label: Incoming PhD Student
basics.summary: Incoming PhD student at the Gatsby Computational Neuroscience Unit working on generative modelling, variational inference, diffusion-based samplers, and probabilistic machine learning.

work.name: University of Cambridge
highlights: Designed diffusion-based generative samplers for molecular energy functions; early experiments halved sampling time versus baseline DDPM.

publications.name: Efficient and Unbiased Sampling of Boltzmann Distributions via Consistency Models
publications.publisher: ML for Physical Sciences at NeurIPS 2024
